messages.content: Let me know if you are interested and I can provide some more details

Hi James - hope you dont mind the direct message!  I love your channel and really enjoy your carboot / vinted content.  I currently sell Lego, Shoes and Clothes on eBay but simply have too much stuff and not enough time!  I am looking to niche down into Lego so have about 400 pairs of shoes that I am looking to shift.   Would you have any interest in a bulk purchase?  I have a spreadsheet listed of the shoes, their condition and size etc.  A combination of new and used, almost all in excellent condition and the sort of brands that you like (Converse, Nike, Timberland, Brooks etc).
